title: noccaea crantzii
intro: Noccaea crantzii, also known as Alpine penny-cress or Rock cabbage, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Noccaea crantzii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
